text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is now over with Meisho Doto
having completed numerous trials in her search
for ambition. The result of her endeavor...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uugh, I'm so sorry about this...

...Is rather mute, despite our attempts to toughen
her up.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... I don't think I have it in me to push past my
competition...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to study! I'll use this autumn to prepare...
for the eventual future.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can't prove it, but I think things will be okay if I
follow Opera O and Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is always confident, and Ayabe is always
looking far ahead...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Those two are amazing, always making the right
decisions. If I think of them as my mentors, then
just maybe...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I believe it will—because those two are very
dear to me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, could you... believe in my choice too?
For me? Um, even just a little bit is fine...
choice_data_list: All right, I'll believe in your decision.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Of course! Those who choose to believe in me will never suffer! Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
As long as you don't get in my way, I won't stop
you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Opera O, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I just know if I follow you two... I'll...

The ceiling that hampers Meisho Doto's growth is
as heavy as ever. But this autumn... hopefully, her
peers will show her what it means to compete.
